reviews.review_description: there is no settings tab, physics is horrendous, way too much nonsense nudity, and all and when i say all i mean all arena or bowling alleys are locked and with the bad physics of the game every time you bowl it goes straight into gutter so there is no chance i'm unlocking those anytime soon maybe i'm just bad at the game but really update it because why when i throw the ball is the ball floating or going high into into the sky?

developer_response.body:
Hello dear SevenApollo17,

First, I'm so sorry for your bad experience!

Second, I fix all the issues you reported.

Can you please check?

Thank you so much,
Eduard

reviews.review_description:
Thia is a fun game. I’ve had it since the beginning when it was Mafia Bowling. The developer has made A LOT of improvements, and continues to do so. He is very responsive in correcting any problems and will do anything he can to make his customers happy. I really appreciate his dedication, time, and attention. 

The environments are fun and have several nice touches, surprises, and extras so don’t forget to take a look around!

Ok, lets start with the name of the player. I have to choose one? I have to play online? Only a look to the help page is answering my question.
Ok, let's have a try. Start. Yes, name again...
Start... There is an entrance room. It seems i have to go a lot of steps to the marked area... OUTSIDE of the guardian area!? No way to get there by teleport, analog sticks or buttons? - Really not?!? I tried but nothing happened.
Ok, i have 3 meters in my real room to go. But i realized, i have to go about the double distance in VR. I had to reset the orientation, to go back in real, further to the target area. Got it! 'Oh, how unconfortable...' - in truth, I had used a different expression.
Ok, there is the alley. Wrong side in my real room... Just again and again, resetting the view orientation.
Checking again, where i am in the room, where is real space for the walk to the alley (Exactly that, what i already did, before i started the app!!!)
Ok. Just do it now...
Swing the ball to the back, to the front, and...:
It's flying. - - - It is STILL... FLYING!!! °° 
With big eyes i started some more attemps. I gave it a try, to get used by it.
-- NO - THANKS! --

Nice graphics and music - here is your star.
But no gaming experience is possible. Continue to work on it!
In my opinion, it is not even on alpha niveau...

developer_response.body:
Hello dear friend :)

Could you kindly check the game again?

I worked really hard to fix all the issues you encountered.

My apologies.

Thank you so much :)
Eduard

reviews.review_description: Once clicking start game and entering the alley, I can’t get the rankings board to close and can’t navigate to the target teleport spot.

developer_response.body:
Hello Darkstar27

Could you kindly try the game again now?

Indeed, I found the problem you mentioned.

Now they are fixed.

Thank you for taking your time to let me know.

Best regards,
Eduard

reviews.review_description: Developer always keen to develop game. I'm so glad I installed this game. Good effort!!!

I enjoy the game, it has a great atmosphere and the graphics are good. IT has great physics and the developer is constantly updating the game, so I know it will just get better.

It would be fun if the pool table was functional as well. But that would probably be a whole new game.

I hope this game gets moved up from App Labs to the real Quest store at some point so it will get more attention.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, we are working at the pool table and we'll add more amazing things ❤️❤️❤️

reviews.review_description:
Had this game since thw first development  stages and have seen the game develope. I find it really fun and means I can play  without leaving the house.  It's bright and easy to use.  Any issues  found are reported and te developer quickly  works to fix issues.  
Fab little game and brilliant  price. Can't really complain :) 😀

developer_response.body: Thank you very much and I'm happy that  you enjoy the game ❤️

reviews.review_description:
Initially, the game was unplayable. The developer was quick to reach out and fix the issue.

The game could be quicker to reset the pins after the second throw, the lane currently waits for the ball to return fully.

Other than that, it is a nice little bowling game, enjoyable to play.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, we'll improve the game :)

reviews.review_description:
Nice bowling game.

The atmosphere is really cool, the room and the alley are quite pretty. There is an screen to recap the scores, and record shoot a close-up of the end of the track during the throws. You can discover things in the menu room. Upstairs from the bowling alley there are even two pool tables which are unplayable as they are. Strictly speaking, we cannot launch a game of billiards, we can push the balls, badly use the cues, it is not playable as it is.

We're here for the bowling anyway, and that's working pretty well and is fun to play. Of course, we do not feel the weight of the ball, but the physics is quite correct, the ball and the pins react correctly.

The game need a little polishes to by really perfect for me, but for the price the game is pretty correct.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much Rimgal!
We are working on improving the weight of the ball and the polish you mention
❤️❤️❤️

Thank you so much! ❤️❤️❤️

Feel free to email me anything you wish to be added at: proeminentcode@gmail.com

reviews.review_title: Looks nice but a bit random.
reviews.review_description: The game looks nice but has issues. While trying to bowl the ball  it often falls to the floor or flies high up into the air which makes it feel like there is no weight to it. When I was bowling and missing the pins it wouldn't count as a turn,so i could have lots of attempts rather than 2 bowls(annoying when other player had 15 attempts before it counted as his turn finished). The game got stuck after the score was displayed at the end of the game,could walk around but there didn't seem anything we could do to go onto another game or try pool. Tried all buttons but couldn't progress from this screen although could walk around. Maybe something we were missing but we had to quit app.

developer_response.body:
Hello dear friend :)

All the issues have been solved.

Could you kindly check the game again?

Thank you very much,
Eduard

reviews.review_description: 75% of the time I throw a ball it goes flying in the air or across the alley. The mechanics of throwing the bowl are way off. And in general everything is just really glitchy. Unfortunately not worth the $1 I got it for on sale.

developer_response.body:
Hello :)

Could you kindly check again?

I made big changes.

Sorry for my mistakes

Thank you so much :)
Eduard
